gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: ضعيف على المشهور - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (18/5)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: ضعيف على المشهور - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (18/5)
text: قَالَ أَبُو عَبْدِ اللَّهِ ( عليه السلام ) إِذَا دَخَلْتَ الْحَرَمَ فَتَنَاوَلْ مِنَ الْإِذْخِرِ فَامْضَغْهُ وَ كَانَ يَأْمُرُ أُمَّ فَرْوَةَ بِذَلِكَ .

en.hubeali: Muhammad Bin Yahya, from Ahmad Bin Muhammad, from Ali Bin Al Hakam, from Ali Bin Abu Hamza, from Abu Baseer who said,
‘Abu Abdullahasws said: ‘When you enter the Harram, so take from the Izkhir (Fragrant grass) and chew it’. And heasws used to instruct Umm Farwaas with that’.
en.sarwar: 3. Muhammad ibn Yahya has narrated from Ahmad ibn Muhammad from Ah ibn al-Hakam from Ah ibn abu Hamzah from abu Basir who has said the following: “Abu ‘Abd Allah, ‘Alayhi al-Salam, has said, ‘When you enter al-Haram (the sacred area), take from al-Idhkhir and chew it well.’ He (the Imam) would instruct ‘Umm Farwah to also do so.”
